---
title: "Data Visualizations Gallery"
subtitle: "A curated set of substantive R, Python, and D3 visualization builds"
page-layout: article
toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
format:
  html:
    code-tools: false
    code-fold: false
    code-copy: false
---

```{=html}
<div style="padding:4.5rem 0 2.5rem;">
  <span class="section-eyebrow">Visualizations</span>
  <h1 class="section-h" style="font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4vw,3.4rem);margin-top:0.5rem;">Curated visualization work.</h1>
  <p class="section-sub" style="margin-bottom:0;">This section now highlights only the builds with enough substance to be worth reviewing. The placeholder and auto-generated stubs have been removed.</p>
</div>
```

## Featured builds

```{=html}
<div class="services-grid" style="margin-top:1.5rem;">
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">📈</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Advanced ggplot2 patterns</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Publication-quality small multiples, custom themes, and statistical annotations in R.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>R</span><span>ggplot2</span><span>Design systems</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="ggplot2-advanced-patterns.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🗺️</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Leaflet mapping workflows</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Interactive mapping with custom popups, layers, and spatial storytelling for operational use.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>Leaflet</span><span>Spatial data</span><span>Interactivity</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="leaflet-maps.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🕸️</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">D3 network and geographic graphics</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Custom D3 builds for force layouts, geographic rendering, and browser-based interaction design.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>D3.js</span><span>Networks</span><span>GeoJSON</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="d3-network-graphs.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🐍</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Python dashboard prototypes</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Dash, Matplotlib, and Seaborn examples focused on analytical clarity rather than filler volume.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>Python</span><span>Dash</span><span>Matplotlib</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="plotly-python-dash.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>
  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🎞️</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Animation and motion</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">Narrative visual motion for change-over-time stories using gganimate and supporting R workflows.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>gganimate</span><span>R</span><span>Storytelling</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="gganimate-animations.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>

  <article class="svc-card">
    <span class="svc-icon">🧭</span>
    <h4 class="svc-title">Custom D3 radar component</h4>
    <p class="svc-body">A more advanced front-end visualization build showing component thinking beyond notebook charts.</p>
    <div class="svc-tags"><span>React</span><span>D3</span><span>Components</span></div>
    <p style="margin-top:1rem;"><a href="react-d3-radar-chart.qmd" class="btn-ghost">View project →</a></p>
  </article>
</div>
```

## Remaining library coverage

- R: [ggplot2 advanced patterns](ggplot2-advanced-patterns.qmd), [gganimate animations](gganimate-animations.qmd), [plotly interactive charts](plotly-interactive-charts.qmd), [leaflet maps](leaflet-maps.qmd)
- Python: [matplotlib advanced](matplotlib-advanced.qmd), [seaborn statistical](seaborn-statistical.qmd), [plotly python dash](plotly-python-dash.qmd), [bokeh interactive](bokeh-interactive.qmd)
- JavaScript: [D3 bar charts](d3-bar-charts.qmd), [D3 network graphs](d3-network-graphs.qmd), [D3 geographic maps](d3-geographic-maps.qmd), [network visualization](network-visualization.qmd), [React D3 radar chart](react-d3-radar-chart.qmd)

[Back to Home →](../index.qmd){.btn-solid style="margin-top:2rem;display:inline-block;"}
